summary: P0: Seguridad Fiscal y Flujo de Reversión (B04) - Complete testing of Credit Notes module. All backend endpoints and frontend UI verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/credit-notes/return-reasons - Returns 6 return reasons correctly
Backend: POST /api/credit-notes - Creates B04 credit note with full reversal
Backend: POST /api/credit-notes - Rejects duplicate reversal on already reversed bill
Backend: GET /api/credit-notes/{id} - Returns specific credit note
Backend: GET /api/credit-notes - Lists all credit notes
Backend: GET /api/credit-notes/reports/summary - Returns summary data
Backend: Validation exists in billing.py lines 298-303 for $0.00 payment blocking
Frontend: /reports/facturas page loads with bill history
Frontend: Date filters (Hoy, Semana, Mes) work correctly
Frontend: Status filter (Pagadas, Reversadas) works correctly
Frontend: Search input visible with placeholder text
Frontend: Click on bill expands details showing items, subtotal, ITBIS, propina, total
Frontend: Reversar (B04) button visible on paid bills
Frontend: Reversal dialog shows DGII warning message
Frontend: Reversal dialog shows 2 reversal types (Total/Parcial)
Frontend: Reversal dialog shows 6 return reasons with descriptions
Frontend: Reasons requiring authorization show 'Req. Autorización' badge
Frontend: Notes field available for additional comments
Frontend: Total a Reversar shows correct amount
Frontend: Generar B04 button creates credit note successfully
Frontend: Reversed bills show 'Reversada' badge and B04 NCF badge
Frontend: Reversed bill details show 'Nota de Crédito Asociada' section
Frontend: Reversar button hidden on already reversed bills
Frontend: Reports page shows 'Historial de Facturas' in Fiscal section
critical_code_review_comments: Credit notes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
NCF B04 sequence generation has fallback to MongoDB if Supabase fails
Zero-value payment validation properly blocks $0.00 invoices with DGII message
Original bill status correctly updates to 'reversed' with audit trail
Inventory rollback works for reasons with affects_inventory=true
seed_data_used: Used existing paid bills from database for reversal testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Notes (B04) module fully implemented and tested. Two credit notes created during testing: B0400000001 (reversal of B0100000105) and B0400000002 (reversal of B0100000102). The /reports/facturas page provides complete bill history with reversal workflow.

features_verified.return_reasons_endpoint: PASS - 6 reasons (ERROR_FACTURACION, DEVOLUCION_PRODUCTO, ANULACION_VENTA, DESCUENTO_POSTERIOR, CAMBIO_NCF, ERROR_PRECIO)
features_verified.credit_note_creation: PASS - Full reversal creates B04 NCF, updates bill status, creates audit log
features_verified.zero_value_validation: PASS - Code review confirms validation in billing.py
features_verified.bill_history_page: PASS - Shows all paid/reversed bills with filters
features_verified.bill_expansion: PASS - Shows items, taxes, totals, payment method
features_verified.reversal_dialog: PASS - DGII warning, reversal types, 6 reasons, notes field
features_verified.b04_generation: PASS - Creates credit note, updates bill, shows success
features_verified.reversed_bill_display: PASS - Shows Reversada badge, NC badge, associated credit note info
